email.subject: Reminder: your interview with Acme Corp tomorrow
email.body_text:
Hi Jordan,

This is a friendly reminder about your interview for the Forward Deployed Engineer role at Acme Corp tomorrow at 10:00 AM PT. Join link will be sent 15 minutes before.

— Acme Scheduling
